name: Cipher
desc: In the fallen city of bandits, Dolos, the 300 Rogues run wild and free.\nRace onward, fleet-footed Thief Star Cifera, Chrysos Heir of the "Trickery" Coreflame. May your web of lies spread with the breeze throughout all lands—\n"Tryna trick me? Not a chance!"

1.name: Read the Room, Seek the Glee
1.desc: Cipher's tally of DMG is <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of its original value. When using the Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, increases Cipher's ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

2.name: In the Fray, Nab On a Spree
2.desc: When Cipher hits an enemy target, there is a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to increase the DMG it receives by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

3.name: From Thin Air, Hard to Foresee
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: The Jig Is Up, Quick to Flee
4.desc: After the "Patron" gets attacked by an ally target, Cipher deals Quantum <u>Additional DMG</u> to it equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Cipher's ATK.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

5.name: Safe in Numbers, Light as a Bee
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: The Thief's Game, Unsung and Free
6.desc: The DMG dealt by <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> from Cipher's Talent increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. During the tally, an additional <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of non-Overflow DMG dealt by this attack is tallied. After the tally is cleared by using Ultimate, <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the cleared tally is returned.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

140601.name: Oops, a Missed Catch
140601.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Cipher's ATK to one designated enemy.
140601.simple_desc: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one enemy.

140602.name: Hey, Jackpot for the Taking
140602.desc: Has a <unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to Weaken one designated enemy and its adjacent targets (decreasing their DMG dealt by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>) and increases Cipher's ATK by <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Moreover, deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Cipher's ATK to one designated enemy, and Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Cipher's ATK to the adjacent targets.
140602.simple_desc: Has a high chance to decrease one enemy and adjacent targets' DMG dealt and increases Cipher's ATK. Deals Quantum DMG to one designated enemy and minor Quantum DMG to adjacent targets.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

140603.name: Yours Truly, <unbreak>Kitty Phantom Thief!</unbreak>
140603.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Cipher's ATK to one designated enemy. Then, deals <u>True DMG</u> equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of the current tally kept by Talent to the one designated enemy. Moreover, deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of Cipher's ATK alongside <u>True DMG</u> equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of the current tally kept by Talent to the one designated enemy and its adjacent targets. And this <u>True DMG</u> is distributed evenly among all targets of this ability.
140603.simple_desc: Deals Quantum DMG and <u>True DMG</u> equal to a percentage of the current tally kept by Talent to one enemy. Moreover, deals minor Quantum DMG and <u>True DMG</u> equal to a percentage of the current tally kept by Talent to the one enemy and its adjacent targets. And this <u>True DMG</u> is distributed evenly among all targets of this ability.

10000017.name: True DMG
10000017.desc: Non-Type DMG that is not affected by any effects. This DMG is not considered as launching 1 attack.

140604.name: The Hospitable Dolosian
140604.desc: When there are no enemy targets in the "Patron" state on the battlefield, Cipher immediately causes one enemy target with the highest Max HP on the battlefield to become the "Patron." When using Skill and Ultimate, the primary target becomes the "Patron." The "Patron" state only takes effect on the most recent target.\nAfter the "Patron" gets attacked by other ally targets, Cipher immediately launches <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> against the "Patron," dealing Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Cipher's ATK. This effect can trigger up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s) per turn, and this trigger count resets at the start of Cipher's turn.\nCipher will tally <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of the non-<u>True DMG</u> dealt by ally targets to the "Patron." Overflow DMG will not be tallied. After using Ultimate, clears this tally.
140604.simple_desc: Cipher causes one enemy target to enter the "Patron" state. After the target in this state gets attacked by teammates, Cipher launches <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, dealing Quantum DMG to the target. This can trigger <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> time(s) per turn.\nCipher will keep a tally of the DMG dealt by allies to the target in the "Patron" state. After using Ultimate, clears this tally.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

10000017.name: True DMG
10000017.desc: Non-Type DMG that is not affected by any effects. This DMG is not considered as launching 1 attack.

140606.name: Attack
140606.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

140607.name: Puss in Boots
140607.desc: Gains "Zagreus's Blessing" that lasts for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> second(s). During this time, Cipher will be undetectable by enemies and her movement speed increases by <unbreak>50%</unbreak>. When approaching an enemy in the overworld/Simulated Universe/Divergent Universe, can immediately gain a random Consumable. Consumables can be gained this way for up to <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> time(s) in each Earth day.\nWhen entering battle with "Zagreus's Blessing" active, deals Quantum DMG equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of Cipher's ATK to all enemies. And the tallied amount Cipher gains from this instance of DMG increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.
140607.simple_desc: Gains "Zagreus's Blessing." While it is active, Cipher cannot be detected by enemies, and gains random Consumables when approaching them. When entering battle, Cipher deals minor Quantum DMG to all enemies.

1.point_desc: When Cipher's SPD is higher than or equal to <unbreak>140</unbreak>/<unbreak>170</unbreak>, CRIT Rate increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, and the gained tally increases by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.
Cipher can tally <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the non-<u>True DMG</u> dealt by ally targets to the enemy targets other than the "Patron." Overflow DMG is not tallied.

10000017.name: True DMG
10000017.desc: Non-Type DMG that is not affected by any effects. This DMG is not considered as launching 1 attack.

1.point_desc: Increases the CRIT DMG dealt by the Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. When Cipher is on the battlefield, DMG received by all enemy targets increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.
